caption: Narendra Modi stands behind a wooden podium against a textured, green stone wall with geometric patterns. He is wearing glasses, a white kurta, and a light-colored Nehru jacket. Two microphones are positioned on the podium in front of him. In the initial sequence, he speaks with his hands clasped together. He then raises his right index finger to emphasize a point while continuing to address the audience. Subsequently, he gestures with both hands open and palms facing inward as he speaks. The final shot shifts focus away from the speaker, showing a close-up of the green decorative wall and a detailed view of a carved wooden panel with overlapping leaf-like patterns. Gold-colored decorative pillars with small pink flowers are visible beside the speaker throughout the first three scenes.
